# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability
Please report security issues **privately** to the platform owner — do not open
a public GitHub issue. We aim to acknowledge reports within 72 hours.

## Supported versions
The `main` branch is the supported version.

## Security posture
See [docs/SECURITY.md](../docs/SECURITY.md) for the controls in place (RLS role
hardening, hashed partner API keys, rate limiting, server-side payment pricing,
CI dependency-audit gate).
